category_sources: Official GStreamer ORC page describes it as a library and tools for compiling and executing SIMD assembly-like programs.
source_facts.description identifies ORC as the Oil Runtime Compiler.
display_name_sources: Official GStreamer module page expands ORC as Optimized Inner Loops Runtime Compiler.
docs_sources: Official GStreamer ORC page is the best official documentation surface and links source downloads and Git.
source_facts.homepage is the official GStreamer ORC module page.
repo_sources: Official GStreamer ORC page links browse Git to https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/orc.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was investigated.
tags_sources: Official GStreamer ORC page describes compiling and executing SIMD assembly-language-like programs.
